tasks.label: Build Pet
tasks.command: "D:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\BuildTools\VC\Auxiliary\Build\vcvarsall.bat" x64 && cl /std:c++17 /EHsc /I Source Source\Main\main.cpp Source\Core\Path.cpp Source\Core\Diary.cpp Source\Engine\Window\Window.cpp Source\Engine\Render\Render.cpp Source\Engine\Input\InputDispatcher.cpp Source\Engine\Input\InputChat.cpp Source\Runtime\Scheduler.cpp Source\Runtime\EventBus.cpp Source\Runtime\StateManager.cpp Source\Systems\Audio\Audio.cpp Source\Systems\Pet\Pet.cpp Source\Systems\Chat\Chat.cpp /Fe:"Distribution\Miss qing\Pet.exe" /link user32.lib gdi32.lib gdiplus.lib winmm.lib
